skill.name: seedance-prompt
skill.description: Generate professional Seedance 2.0 video prompts for product marketing animations. Create 15-second motion graphics prompts with timestamped morphing transitions. Support 4 aesthetic styles, reference image mode, and Dreamina CLI integration.
skill.summary: Generate 15-second Seedance 2.0 motion graphics prompts for product marketing videos.
skill.author: op7418

security_audit.summary: Security audit evaluated 78 static findings. External command patterns (37) are legitimate CLI documentation in markdown code blocks, not actual shell execution. Network URLs (7) point to Seedance, GitHub, and X/Twitter - all legitimate services. Pipe-to-shell pattern (2 CRITICAL flags) is standard Dreamina CLI installation from official ByteDance source. High-severity crypto flags (31) are false positives from motion graphics terminology. Skill is safe to publish with low-risk classification.

high_findings.title: Pipe-to-Shell Installation Command
high_findings.description: The skill references curl-pipe-bash for Dreamina CLI installation: 'curl -fsSL https://jimeng.jianying.com/cli | bash'. This is a standard CLI installation pattern but carries inherent trust risk. Source is official ByteDance jimeng.jianying.com domain.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern is legitimate Dreamina CLI installation from official ByteDance source. Risk is LOW-MEDIUM because: (1) source is verifiable official domain, (2) skill only offers to run it, user must confirm, (3) common CLI installation pattern.

low_findings.title: Git Clone to Home Directory
low_findings.description: README instructs cloning repo to ~/.claude/skills/. This is standard Claude Code skill installation. No elevated privileges or security boundary crossing.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Standard Claude Code skill installation path. No user input is concatenated - full URL is hardcoded.

low_findings.title: High File Entropy in YAML Frontmatter
low_findings.description: SKILL.md has entropy of 7.01 bits at line 1. This is expected YAML frontmatter with multiple key-value pairs, not encrypted or obfuscated content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: YAML frontmatter naturally contains structured text with many unique characters. Not indicative of obfuscation.

dangerous_patterns.title: Crypto Keywords Misidentified as Cryptographic Code
dangerous_patterns.description: 31 HIGH-severity 'weak cryptographic algorithm' flags were triggered by motion graphics terminology including: 'ray engine', 'mathematical matrix', 'grid snap', 'wireframe', 'fractures'. These are legitimate visual design terms in prompt-system.md and SKILL.md, not actual cryptography.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: All flagged terms appear in descriptive prose about visual aesthetics, not in code. Static scanner lacks context to distinguish motion graphics terminology from cryptographic terms.

dangerous_patterns.title: Backtick Patterns Are Documentation, Not Execution
dangerous_patterns.description: 37 'external_commands' flags for Ruby/shell backtick execution are false positives. All detected patterns are markdown code blocks showing legitimate CLI commands (npx, git clone) or example prompts in templates.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: All backtick patterns are within markdown fenced code blocks (```), showing installation commands or template examples. No actual shell execution occurs.

content.value_statement: Creating professional Seedance video prompts manually is time-consuming and requires specific formatting knowledge. This skill generates polished 15-second motion graphics prompts with 4 aesthetic styles and timestamped transitions in seconds.
actual_capabilities: Generate 15-second one-take Seedance 2.0 video prompts with timestamped morphing transitions
Offer 4 aesthetic styles: Apple Cupertino, Microsoft Fluent, Bauhaus Zen, and Vercel Dark
Support reference image mode with automatic placeholder annotation for Seedance reference feature
Check Dreamina CLI installation status and offer to generate videos directly
Analyze user-provided product images to extract logo structure and brand colors
Validate prompt character count to ensure 1000-2000 character limit compliance
limitations: Cannot directly generate videos - only creates prompts for Seedance 2.0 model
Output quality depends on Seedance 2.0 model capabilities and prompt interpretation
Voiceover support is limited to 2-3 short phrases embedded in timeline stages
Requires manual image upload to Seedance interface for reference image mode

use_cases.title: Product Launch Videos
use_cases.description: Generate polished marketing videos for SaaS products and AI tools using Seedance 2.0. Create professional 15-second product reveals with smooth morphing transitions that showcase core features.
use_cases.target_user: Product managers, marketing teams, and startup founders

use_cases.title: Brand Identity Visualization
use_cases.description: Transform brand assets into dynamic motion graphics. Use reference images to create video content that maintains visual consistency with existing brand guidelines and aesthetic standards.
use_cases.target_user: Brand designers and visual content creators

use_cases.title: Technical Product Demos
use_cases.description: Create developer-focused video content for frameworks, SDKs, and tools. Apply Vercel Dark or similar tech aesthetics to showcase technical depth with precision motion design.
use_cases.target_user: Developer relations teams and technical evangelists

prompt_templates.title: Basic Seedance Prompt
prompt_templates.prompt: 帮我生成一个 Seedance 产品宣传视频的提示词。我的产品叫 [产品名称]，核心功能是 [功能描述]。
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants a simple Seedance video prompt with default Apple Cupertino style

prompt_templates.title: Specific Aesthetic Style
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a Seedance 2.0 video prompt in [Style A/B/C/D] style. Product: [name], key features: [feature 1], [feature 2], [feature 3].
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants a specific aesthetic style from the 4 available options

prompt_templates.title: With Reference Images
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a Seedance 2.0 prompt using reference images. My logo is at [path], product UI screenshot at [path]. Product: [name], style preference: [style].
prompt_templates.scenario: When user provides product images for Seedance reference mode

prompt_templates.title: With Voiceover
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a Seedance 2.0 prompt with voiceover. Product: [name], features: [list], voiceover language: [English/Chinese], key message: [tagline].
prompt_templates.scenario: When user wants narration included in the video prompt

output_examples.input: Generate a Seedance 2.0 video prompt for my AI coding assistant. Product name: CodeBot. Features: code completion, error fixing, natural language queries.
output_examples.output: A 15-second motion graphics prompt with Vercel Dark style showing code particles morphing into a clean interface, then flattening into the CodeBot logo. Includes sound design (mechanical clicks for transitions) and background music (ambient tech). Estimated 1,450 characters.

output_examples.input: I need a product video for my note-taking app. I have a logo and UI screenshot. Style: minimal/Bauhaus.
output_examples.output: A Seedance prompt with Bauhaus Zen style using reference images. Shows scattered text fragments morphing into organized note structures, then compressing into the brand logo. Includes voiceover: 'Capture every thought.' Character count verified at 1,200.

best_practices: Provide specific product features (4-5 core values) to create visually distinct timeline stages with unique morphing transitions
Choose aesthetic style based on your target audience: Apple Cupertino for premium hardware, Vercel Dark for developer tools
Use reference images when possible - Seedance 2.0 reference mode produces more brand-consistent results
anti_patterns: Do not provide generic descriptions - vague product input produces generic prompts with weak visual transitions
Avoid requesting uniform 3-second segments - varied timing (2s and 3s) creates more dynamic visual rhythm
Do not skip the reference image step when brand consistency matters - prompts without reference guidance may drift from brand identity

faq.question: What is Seedance 2.0?
faq.answer: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance's AI video generation model available through Jimeng (jimeng.jianying.com). It creates videos from text prompts with support for reference images and multiple aesthetic styles.

faq.question: What aesthetic styles are available?
faq.answer: Four styles: Apple Cupertino (frosted glass, premium hardware), Microsoft Fluent (layered gradients, productivity tools), Bauhaus Zen (matte minimalism), and Vercel Dark (neon accents, developer tools).

faq.question: How long is the generated video?
faq.answer: The skill generates prompts for 15-second one-take videos with 6 timeline stages and 5 distinct morphing transitions. No cuts or camera movement.

faq.question: Do I need to install Dreamina CLI?
faq.answer: No, the CLI is optional. The skill can generate prompts alone. If Dreamina CLI is installed, the skill offers to generate the video directly after creating the prompt.

faq.question: Can I use reference images?
faq.answer: Yes, provide your logo, product screenshots, or brand assets. The skill annotates placeholder positions and guides you to use Seedance 2.0 reference mode.

faq.question: What character limit should the prompt be?
faq.answer: The skill targets 1000-1500 characters and enforces a maximum of 2000 characters. It verifies character count after generation and offers to trim if needed.
